code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(line)
mut total = 0
mut current = 0
mut have = false
mut done = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  if not done
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else
      if have
        let next_sum = total + current
        if next_sum > 100
          done = true
        else
          total = next_sum
        end
        current = 0
        have = false
      end
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if have
  if not done
    let next_sum = total + current
    if next_sum <= 100
      total = next_sum
    end
  end
end
println("total=#{total}")
